windows.embed_text: a glass filled with pink glitter and a small bottle filled with pink and white beads | a glass filled with pink glitter and beads
windows.embed_text_v2: sprinkling pink glitter from a shaker into a clear round glass dish of gel wax, decorating with white pearl beads and pastel faux sprinkles, magenta sparkly water candle assembly
windows.summary_v2: Bright pink glitter is sprinkled from a shaker over a clear gel-filled glass dish already decorated with pearl beads and pastel sprinkles, building a decorative gel candle.

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down on a clear round glass dish on a white glittery surface; a clear shaker tube pours bright pink glitter onto the dish, which already holds white pearl beads and pastel faux-sprinkle decorations in clear gel.
Pink glitter continues sprinkling into the glass dish, building a vivid magenta mound over the gel; pearls and colored sprinkles ring the inside edge.
The shaker lifts slightly; a thick layer of pink glitter now coats the gel surface, surrounded by the pearl-bead border and pastel bits, other vessels blurred behind.
A purple-glitter shaker tube tips in from the right, adding sparkle beside the pink; the clear dish sits on the shimmering white tabletop.
The glitter layer is mounded and even across the dish; pink/lilac sparkle fills the center with the pearl ring and candy-colored sprinkles framing it.
Shaker hovers over the dish dispensing more fine pink glitter, deepening the saturated magenta gel-candle surface.
Steady pour of pink glitter onto the decorated glass dish; the sparkly mound grows, pearls and pastel sprinkles still visible at the rim.
Final view of the glass dish heaped with pink glitter over the gel base, pearl-bead border and colorful sprinkles set for a decorative gel candle.

windows.embed_text_v2: sprinkling lilac purple glitter from a shaker into a clear round glass dish of gel wax, pearl beads and pastel sprinkles border, violet sparkly water candle decoration
windows.summary_v2: Lilac-purple glitter is sprinkled from a shaker over the clear gel-filled glass dish ringed with pearls and sprinkles, building a sparkly decorative gel candle.

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down on the same clear round glass dish; a clear shaker tube pours lilac-purple glitter onto a now purple-tinted gel surface ringed by pearl beads and pastel sprinkles.
Purple glitter continues falling into the dish, the sparkly lilac mound spreading over the gel; pearl border and colorful sprinkles around the edge.
Shaker pours steadily; the gel-candle surface is now densely coated in purple glitter, a few air bubbles trapped in the clear gel below the pearls.
Thick even layer of lilac glitter across the dish; the shaker tip hovers at upper-right, pearls and pastel bits framing the sparkly center.
More purple glitter sprinkled on, deepening the violet sheen; the clear glass dish sits on the shimmering white surface among blurred jars.
The purple glitter mound is full and saturated; pearl-bead ring and candy sprinkles clearly border the decorated gel surface.
Shaker continues dispensing fine lilac glitter over the dish, the violet sparkle layer building higher.
Final top-down of the glass dish heaped with lilac-purple glitter over the gel, pearls and pastel sprinkles set, a thin stick now resting in the center.

windows.embed_text_v2: pouring dark wine-red molten gel wax from a black pot into a clear round glass dish over purple glitter pearls and sprinkles, filling a translucent gel water candle
windows.summary_v2: Dark wine-red molten gel wax is poured from a black pot into a clear glass dish already decorated with purple glitter, pearls and sprinkles, filling the gel candle.

tags_v2.action: pour molten gel wax into vessel

seconds_v2.desc: A black metal pouring pot tips dark wine-red molten gel wax toward a clear round glass dish that already holds purple glitter, pearls and pastel decorations in clear gel on a glittery white surface.
The deep-red gel wax streams from the pot's lip into the decorated glass dish, settling as a translucent crimson layer over the sparkly purple base.
Continued pour of dark red gel into the dish; the crimson liquid pools and spreads, pearls and glitter visible through the tinted gel.
Pot tilts further, more wine-red gel poured; the glass dish fills with the rich red layer over the purple-glitter decorations.
The black pot, its interior streaked with dried wax, keeps pouring red gel into the round dish below, the colored liquid rising in the vessel.
Red gel wax continues filling around the pearl-bead border; the dish now holds a deep crimson pool over the sparkly purple base.
Pouring slows; the glass dish is largely filled with translucent wine-red gel, decorations suspended within, a small red sequin floating.
Final pour view: the black pot lifts away as the round glass dish sits full of dark red gel over the purple-glitter and pearl decoration.

windows.old_description: Pink round candle with embedded flowers.
windows.embed_text_v2: finished spherical glass water candle filled with translucent pink gel and seashells, purple glitter top, single lit flame, decorative reveal on a vanity
windows.summary_v2: A finished spherical glass water candle filled with pink gel and seashells, topped with purple glitter, burns on a vanity in a product reveal.

seconds_v2.desc: Finished spherical glass 'water candle' on a vanity: a round fishbowl vessel filled with translucent pink gel, white seashells and decorations inside, a purple-glitter wax top with a small lit flame.
The completed gel candle glows; pink gel and embedded shells fill the round glass globe, purple sparkly cap on top with a tiny central flame burning.
Same finished sphere candle lit on the dressing table; pink interior with pale wax drips and shells, glittery purple lid, flame steady.
The decorative water candle continues to burn; warm flame atop the purple-glitter surface, pink-gel globe with shell decor glowing.
Reveal hold on the round pink gel candle with seashells and a pearl/shell ornament behind, purple sparkly top lit by a small flame.
Finished spherical gel candle burning quietly; translucent pink body, glitter cap, decorative shells visible through the glass.
Continued display of the lit water candle, flame on the purple-glitter top, pink gel and shells filling the glass sphere on the vanity.
Final reveal of the completed round pink gel water candle with seashells, glittery purple surface and a single burning flame.

windows.old_description: Purple gel fills the round vessel.
windows.embed_text_v2: pouring clear liquid gel from a blue bottle into a small round glass filled with transparent gel beads, water candle base assembly, bubbles, glittery tabletop
windows.summary_v2: Clear liquid gel is poured from a blue bottle into a small round glass holding transparent gel beads, the early assembly of a water candle.

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down on a small round stemless glass on a glittery white surface; a blue bottle pours clear liquid gel into the glass, which holds transparent gel beads and a few dark accents, a ring light reflected behind.
Clear liquid continues pouring from the blue bottle into the round glass, the transparent gel beads settling at the bottom as the liquid level rises.
The blue bottle streams more clear gel; bubbles and translucent beads swirl in the filling glass on the sparkly tabletop.
Pouring continues, the small glass now half full of clear liquid over the gel beads, bottle tipped from the right.
Clear gel keeps filling the round glass; transparent beads and tiny dark bits suspended, ring-light glow reflected behind.
The glass is nearly full of clear liquid gel with beads at the base; blue bottle still pouring a thin stream.
Pour slows as the bottle lowers near the rim; the round glass holds clear gel and beads, surface bubbling slightly.
Final view: the blue bottle lifts away, the small round glass filled with clear liquid gel and transparent beads, ready for further decoration.

windows.embed_text_v2: Pouring deep burgundy purple liquid gel wax from a dark pitcher into a round glass bowl filled with clear gel beads, pearls and a suspended flower, gold-rimmed sphere on glittery surface
windows.summary_v2: A dark pitcher pours burgundy-purple liquid gel/wax into a small round glass bowl filled with clear beads and a flower, forming a translucent purple gel candle.

tags_v2.action: pouring colored gel into glass bowl

seconds_v2.desc: A dark pitcher tilts over a small round glass bowl filled with clear gel beads, beginning to pour dark burgundy liquid wax/gel into it.
The burgundy liquid streams from the pitcher into the bowl; a purple patch spreads over the clear beads at the surface.
Pouring continues, the dark liquid pooling and tinting the upper layer of beads deep purple while clear beads remain below.
More burgundy liquid is poured in, the purple coloring sinking and spreading further down through the bead-filled bowl.
The bowl is now mostly filled with translucent purple liquid surrounding a flower and beads; the pitcher hovers above still pouring.
Pouring slows; the bowl is nearly full of clear deep-purple gel with beads and a flower suspended inside.
A final pour tops up the bowl, the liquid swirling magenta-purple around the suspended decorations.
The pitcher lifts away; the filled round glass bowl holds a transparent purple gel candle with a flower and beads set inside.
